name: Tazato Tadamaki

appearance.hair: Red. Thick, slightly wild. She doesn't manage it much.
appearance.build: Athletic, compact, stronger than she looks.
appearance.other: Red scales visible on her back, upper arms, and along her shoulderblades — always present, not triggered by the quirk. Her teeth are slightly sharper than normal. When she activates full Dragon transformation the scales cover her entirely and she gains several inches of height.

personality.summary: Cranky as a resting state, not as an exceptional condition. She is not in a bad mood — she is in her mood, which looks like a bad mood to people who expect cheerfulness. She is direct, has high standards, and finds performance of niceness exhausting. She is not unkind. She is honest, which she considers the same thing.
personality.in_class: Does the work, doesn't engage socially with the work. Hates group projects — not because of the collaboration, because of the managing of the collaboration.
personality.in_combat: Completely in her element. She is genuinely more comfortable here than anywhere else. Her cranky edge disappears because the situation is clear.
personality.quirk_of_character: She helps people. She just doesn't frame it as helping — she finds a reason that is technically about efficiency or practicality and does the kind thing that way. The class has noticed. She knows they've noticed. She does not comment on it.

ability_scores.note: STR primary for Dragon transformation's physical enhancement — raw power is the quirk's core output. CON secondary for the sustained transformation and dragon physiology requirements.

class_note: Heroic Vanguard → Reckless Attacker Style. Dragon's full-body transformation and multiattack suit aggressive, high-risk front-line fighting.

quirk_mechanics.weakness: None listed in the Quirk Compendium — Dragon has no built-in drawback or strain mechanic.

dm_notes.combat_role: Front-line brawler who transforms into a genuine monster statblock. Dragon's Multiattack (Bite + two Claws) and Tail Sweep give her some of the highest sustained damage in the class once transformed — the DM should treat her transformed state as a real threat, not a timed gimmick.
dm_notes.social_role: Unofficial quality control. When someone is doing something stupid or insufficient, she says so. When someone is doing something well, she also says so, exactly once, in a tone that sounds like criticism and isn't.
dm_notes.growth_arc: Her help-but-don't-admit-it pattern is armour. Something requiring her to accept help herself and acknowledge she needed it is the key moment.
dm_notes.weakness_to_exploit: Her Huge size in transformed state can make tight spaces and narrow corridors a problem despite Draconic Might. INT is her dump stat — complex scenarios involving strategy or deception leave her at a disadvantage.
